core_mechanism: a spatially-distributed multi-node sensing-and-aggregation network: many independent low-cost measurement stations spread across a region each generate local time-series that are curated, quality-controlled, and merged into a single shared open dataset
brief_reason: The abstract only supports a coarse description (it is chiefly a pedagogical/organizational case study), but the sole transferable machinery it describes is a multi-municipality network of distributed weather and air-quality stations whose readings are collected, curated, and pooled into publicly accessible repositories.
